# fragmentsComplete

**Type Property**

Indicates that the format reader can’t receive any more fragments.

## Declaration

```swift
static var fragmentsComplete: MEFormatReaderParseAdditionalFragmentsStatus { get }
```

## Discussion

Additional calls of [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEFormatReader/parseAdditionalFragments(completionHandler:)] return an error.

## Evaluating a fragment parsing operation

- **sizeIncreased**: Indicates that the format reader file size increased.
- **fragmentAdded**: Indicates that the format reader received one or more fragments.
